title: zannichellia palustris subsp. cyclostigma
intro: Zannichellia palustris subsp. cyclostigma, also known as the starwort or hornwort, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the family Zannichelliaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. Its leaves and roots are known to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing pain and swelling, and protecting against cell damage. Zannichellia palustris subsp. cyclostigma can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
